# Prompt Pattern: pattern-title

## Intent

What class of task this pattern is for.

## Inputs

Required context before use.

## Prompt Shape

System constraints, user request framing, and expected output contract.

## Tool Sequence

Ordered tools and why each is needed.

## Success Criteria

How to tell the run succeeded.

## Common Failure Modes

Typical misses and corrective actions.

## Example

A short representative prompt.

## Links

Related decision notes, tool recipes, and context packs.
